//: SOFT reminder hook, NOT enforcement. After the orchestrator spawns a worker subagent via the Agent tool (alias Task, renamed from Task in CC 2.1.63), this PostToolUse hook runs verify-reminder.sh, which injects a non-blocking additionalContext nudge to run the verification gate (spawn the `verifier` subagent) for high-stakes work. It emits {} when the spawned agent IS the verifier, to avoid a verify-the-verifier loop. The matcher covers both the current tool name (Agent) and its legacy alias (Task).
